site.title: Annual Open-Source AI Phenomenon
site.subtitle: Track the tools that defined each year.
site.description: A curated annual archive of phenomenon-level open-source AI tools.

common.quickStartBody: If you are browsing casually, start with the year tabs and scenario cards to see what defined each year at a glance.
common.builderBody: If you are evaluating tools for implementation, use the filters, search, and detail pages to compare fit, integration cost, and maturity.
common.scenariosSubtitle: Start your discovery from popular use cases and frameworks.
common.scenarioSubtitle: Inspired by task-first discovery patterns, pick a scenario to see matching open-source tools across 2023-2025.
common.noResults: No tools match this scenario yet. Try another scenario.
common.recommendFallback: Recommended by current trend and popularity
common.noFavorites: No favorites yet — star a tool to save it.
common.quickFlowBody: Pick a task scenario first, scan the year-based cards, then open a detail page for the plain summary and official demo.
common.proFlowBody: Use difficulty, community size, and tags to narrow candidates, then combine search hits and compare panel signals to assess integration cost and maturity.

knowledge.pageDescription: Start from core concepts and terms, then connect to related domains, industry applications, and cross-disciplinary topics to build a complete AIGC mental model.
knowledge.termsSubtitle: Understand definitions first, then common misconceptions.
knowledge.domainSubtitle: See how model, system, and application layers connect to real products.
knowledge.industrySubtitle: Map pain points to AIGC capabilities and representative use cases.
knowledge.crossDisciplineSubtitle: AIGC is not only about models; it also involves interaction, cognition, law, and design.
knowledge.noMatches: No matching content found. Try a different keyword or reset filters.
